resources.string: Compress one image, compress many images, or remove a background.
Choose JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Your images stay local unless you share or save them.
Compress toward your selected size. Actual output may vary to preserve quality.
For low-size compression, avoid PNG. JPG or WEBP usually create smaller files.
Prioritizes detail and avoids visible blur.
Good quality with meaningful size reduction.
Transparent pixels will be placed over the selected background color for JPG export.
Target size must be greater than zero.
Target size is too small for reliable image output.
Target size is larger than this app supports.
Use MB for very large targets.
Upscaling is off. Enable it to make the image larger.
The original image was not changed. Start again when you are ready.
Image preview with selected background color
Runs on this device and exports a transparent PNG. Images are not uploaded.
Compare the original and processed output before saving.
Select an image and run compression to compare results here.
Compressed and background-removed images appear here after a successful operation.

Image processing, including background removal, happens on your device. The app has no user accounts or remote image-processing backend. Internet access is used by Google advertising and consent services.

App code does not send selected or generated images, filenames, content URIs, EXIF metadata, or image-processing data to Google Mobile Ads. The SDK automatically collects and shares IP-derived approximate location, product interactions, diagnostics, and device or account identifiers for advertising, analytics, and fraud prevention.

This app uses Google AdMob banner, native, interstitial, and app-open ads. Interstitials are eligible when History is opened and immediately before Save, Share, or Open. The current threshold requires no prior successful action.

After an interstitial is shown, another is blocked for at least three minutes, with at most three interstitials per app-process session. Those limits do not apply to app-open ads, which may appear on a foreground return after loading. Full-screen ads are suppressed during active image processing, and requested actions continue if an ad is unavailable.
Background removal runs offline with a bundled ONNX U2-NetP model. Images are processed on-device and are not uploaded by this feature.
Open-source notices are packaged with the app.

Photo Compressor selects, compresses, resizes, converts, saves, opens, shares, and removes or replaces image backgrounds. Image processing runs on your device. The app has no user accounts or developer backend for image upload or processing. Internet access is used by Google advertising and consent services. App-private data is protected by the Android app sandbox; Google states that Mobile Ads SDK network data is encrypted in transit using TLS.

You choose images through the Android system Photo Picker. The app reads each content URI and local metadata needed for processing, including the display name, media type, size, dimensions, format, transparency information, and EXIF orientation. When the provider permits, the app keeps a persisted read permission so local History can reopen the source; Clear History does not currently release it. App code does not upload selected or generated images or their metadata. Outputs are opened or shared only after you choose that action. Save writes through Android MediaStore to Pictures/Photo Compressor. On Android 9 or earlier only, a user-initiated Save requests legacy shared-storage write permission; it is not requested on Android 10 or later.

The app keeps up to 200 records in app-private DataStore, including source and output references, names, types, sizes, dimensions, formats, operation and compression details, result or warning information, saved-output references, and timestamps. This DataStore is excluded from configured cloud backup and device transfer. Temporary outputs may remain in cache. Removing an item or using Clear History removes its record and attempts to delete only its referenced app-owned temporary output. Clear History does not delete gallery images, guarantee deletion of orphaned cache files, or release persisted source read permissions. Android Clear Cache can remove temporary files; Clear Storage removes app-local records and cache. Delete saved images through the gallery or file manager. The app has no user accounts.

Google AdMob provides banner, native, interstitial, and app-open ads. Interstitials are eligible when History is opened and immediately before Save, Share, or Open, with no prior successful action required. After one is shown, another is blocked for at least three minutes, with at most three per app-process session. These limits do not apply to app-open ads, which may appear on a foreground return after loading. Google Mobile Ads SDK 25.4.0 automatically collects and shares IP-derived approximate location; product interactions such as launches, taps, and ad or video views; diagnostics such as app launch time, hang rate, and energy usage; and device or account identifiers such as Advertising ID and App Set ID. Google states that it uses these data for advertising or marketing, analytics, and fraud prevention, security, and compliance, and encrypts SDK data in transit using TLS. User Messaging Platform SDK 4.0.0 requests consent information and displays consent or privacy-options forms when Google reports they are required. Core image processing works without personalized-ad consent and when ads are unavailable or the device is offline.
Background removal uses a bundled U2-NetP ONNX model and ONNX Runtime entirely on the device. App code does not download a remote model or upload an image for this feature.

Photo Compressor is a general-purpose utility and is not directed to children under 13. The automatic Google advertising-SDK practices described above apply whenever the SDK is allowed to request ads. Publisher action before release: configure the Play target-audience and advertising settings consistently with this statement, and reassess the app and policy before offering it to a child-directed audience.

Google\'s privacy policy and Mobile Ads data disclosure apply to data handled by Google advertising services: policies.google.com/privacy and developers.google.com/admob/android/privacy/play-data-disclosure. Focused open-source notices for key privacy and model components are included with the app; they are not an exhaustive dependency inventory. Publisher action required before release: add the verified legal developer or entity name, a direct monitored privacy contact, and an active, publicly accessible, non-geofenced, non-editable HTTPS privacy-policy webpage that is not a PDF. Use the same current policy in Play and in the app, and update its effective date when the app or its services change.
Cancel compression before leaving this screen.
No app can handle this action.
The image is no longer available.
Select one image before removing a background.
Please retry or remove inaccessible history items.
Couldn\'t save image. Please try again.
Image saved, but couldn\'t update History.
Storage access is required to save images on Android 9 or earlier.
This file is not a readable image.
Unsupported image format. Choose JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
This image is too large to process safely on this device. Choose a smaller resize percentage.
The processed image is no longer available.
Could not create the Photo Compressor folder in Pictures.
Could not create a MediaStore entry.
Could not open the save destination.
This image could not be decoded.
%1$d × %2$d is too large to process safely on this device. Choose a smaller resize percentage.
This image could not be read.
No readable stream for selected image.
Photo access was denied. Select the image again.
Image is unavailable. If it is stored in the cloud, download it locally or pick it from Files.
The compressed image could not be validated.
Allow storage access to save images on Android 9 or earlier.
Shared storage is unavailable. Check the device storage and try again.
PNG is lossless and the original resolution was preserved.
PNG is lossless, so size reduction was performed through safe resizing.
PNG is lossless. The original resolution was preserved, so the exact target could not be reached.
PNG is lossless. Best quality result created, but the exact target could not be reached without significant resolution loss.
Original resolution preserved. The exact target could not be reached at an acceptable encoder quality.
Best quality result created. The exact target could not be reached without significant quality loss.
Target reached by reducing resolution while preserving acceptable encoder quality.
Processed at a safe resolution to avoid running out of memory on this device.
Could not initialize the background-removal model.
Could not read the selected image.
The image is too large to process on this device.
Background removal failed while running the model.
Could not create the transparent PNG result.
The background-removal model is incompatible with this app version.
Background removal failed. Try a smaller image or another photo.
Background removal is unavailable on this device.
